name: BIROS
notes: DLR FireBird-2 platform carrying the HSRS bi-spectral infrared payload; improved TET-X bus with additional technology payloads.

name: FireSat-1 (Muon Space)
notes: First FireSat pathfinder/protoflight satellite. Payload values in sensor table use current public 50-80 m GSD and 1,500 km swath sources.

name: FOREST 16
notes: GNSSP Axis 1.1 thermal wildfire-monitoring satellite for the Hellenic Fire System; FOREST-3-derived 8U OroraTech platform.

name: FOREST 17
notes: GNSSP Axis 1.1 thermal wildfire-monitoring satellite for the Hellenic Fire System; FOREST-3-derived 8U OroraTech platform.

name: FOREST 18
notes: GNSSP Axis 1.1 thermal wildfire-monitoring satellite for the Hellenic Fire System; FOREST-3-derived 8U OroraTech platform.

name: FOREST 19
notes: GNSSP Axis 1.1 thermal wildfire-monitoring satellite for the Hellenic Fire System; FOREST-3-derived 8U OroraTech platform.

name: Forest-1
notes: OroraTech thermal-infrared camera hosted on an enlarged Spire Lemur-2 6U CubeSat; orbit altitude reported as 525 km +/- 25 km by eoPortal.

name: Forest-2
notes: Dedicated OroraTech pilot mission hosted on a Spire Lemur-2-class 6U platform; eoPortal lists 540 km orbit and local time of descending node around 13:00-14:00.

name: Forest-3
notes: OroraTech 8U internally developed satellite launched on SpaceX Transporter-12 with three-channel TIR camera, optical imager, onboard AI, and X-band downlink.

name: OTC P1-1
notes: One of eight OTC Phase 1 Spire-built 8U satellites carrying OroraTech infrared cameras for wildfire detection; Rocket Lab deployed the plane to a 550 km orbit.
